title: NG2 1LT, Northern Foods Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/WP3331UH/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Northern Foods Limited   Installation name: Nottingham Gateside Road Pizza   Permit number: EPR/WP3331UH/V003   "
